items.title: Deon Cole Says You HAVE to Be (A Little) Corny to Make It
items.body_excerpt: Deon Cole says you HAVE to be a lil corny to make it 😂 He explains why trying to be cool all the time is a losing game 👀

items.title: Clippers Rookie Keaton Wagler Says His NBA Comp Is Pacers Star Tyrese Haliburton | Cousins

author.display_name: Cousins with Vince Carter & Tracy McGrady

items.body_excerpt: Keaton Wagler already knows which NBA star his game resembles. 👀🏀 @FanDuel The No. 5 overall pick and newest Los Angeles Clippers rookie says his NBA comparison is Indiana Pacers All-Star Tyrese Haliburton, pointing to his playmaking, court vision, and ability to make his…
